name: Lemon Cookies/st Louis Post
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Grease baking sheets.
Combine cake mix, eggs, oil, and lemon juice in a large bowl. Beat with an electric mixer until well blended. Stir in chopped nuts or flaked coconut. Shape into 1-inch balls and place on prepared cookie sheets, 1 inch apart.
Bake for 6 to 7 minutes or until lightly browned. Let cool for 1 minute on the cookie sheet. Remove from the oven and transfer to a cooling rack. Dust with powdered sugar. Yield: About 3 dozen cookies.
